required_directories.description: Directories that MUST exist under .intent/ for the tree to be valid.

optional_directories.description: Directories that MAY exist under .intent/. Including a directory here is the constitutional act of making it part of the Mind.

validated_directories.description: Subset of optional_directories that the META validator actively validates against JSON schemas. Directories listed here but without a matching schema are skipped with a warning.

packs.description: Governance packs to apply from the installed core-runtime. Each entry activates a named pack's rules and enforcement mappings. Custom rules (repo-authored) always override pack rules on rule_id conflict.

source.description: builtin: resolved from installed core-runtime pack registry. local: resolved from .intent/packs/ in this repo. Defaults to builtin.

overrides.description: Per-rule enforcement overrides. Adopters may downgrade enforcement (blocking→reporting) but not upgrade beyond the pack's declared level.

default.notes: Authoritative inputs: META, constitution, rules. Non-authoritative: papers. Everything else is out of scope for enforcement.
